article_meta.title: News Law & the Courts Black Lives Matter Director Spent Millions in Donations on Homes, Shopping, Vacations, Indictment

reasoning: The model avoided quoting source language but included questionable and incorrect flags, misapplied a bias type to a properly attributed statistic, used a meta-level, non-textual "biasedText," and missed several clear loaded phrases in the author's prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items came from the author's prose; no quoted or attributed source statements were treated as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One item wrongly claimed Omission of Source Attribution despite explicit attribution to tax filings, another used a meta paraphrase not present in the text, and one was a debatable spin claim on factual assertions.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear loaded author phrasing such as 'personal indulgences,' 'supplement her lifestyle,' and 'shopping sprees' tied to the indictment allegations.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The first item’s Slant label is defensible, but the second (Spin) is debatable, the third (Omission of Source Attribution) is incorrect, and the fourth (Bias by Story Choice and Placement) is misapplied and not anchored to text.
